title: ocimum grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum
intro: Ocimum grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum, also known as sacred basil, is a subspecies of the Ocimum basilicum plant family, native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ocimum grandiflorum subsp. grandiflorum include reducing stress and anxiety, improving cognitive function, and aiding in the management of digestive issues. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve mood, and support overall well-being.
